name: environment-services-pattern
description: IEnvironment.services holds injected dependencies. Currently has: persistence (required), auth? (optional). Services accessed via getEnv<IEnvironment>(self).services.{serviceName}. Context holds metadata (schemaName, location).
relevantCode: interface IEnvironment { services: { persistence: IPersistenceService; auth?: IAuthService; }; context: {...} }
recommendation: Extend with: backendRegistry: IBackendRegistry (required for queryable), queryValidator?: IQueryValidator (optional)
